sections.paragraph:
Original: מתן

Transliteration: môthen

Phonetic: mo'-then

BDB Definition:

  1. loins, hips
    1. used with H2223 in Pro 30:31; perhaps an extinct animal, exact meaning unknown

Origin: from an unused root meaning to be slender

TWOT entry: 1267a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
